query: faded polaroid old photograph yellowed vintage snapshot
message: sub:analog_degradation/faded_polaroid — anti_aesthetic — sepia, yellowing, faded snapshots, browned old photos

response.objective_caption: A large dark green arched structure sits in a vast snow-covered field. Dry brown grasses and reeds protrude through the snow in the foreground and middle ground. Three tall, thin vertical towers rise near the horizon to the right of the structure, with a distant tree line visible behind them. The flat landscape extends to the horizon under a pale, bright sky.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A large dark green arched structure sits in a vast snow-covered field rendered in muted, faded tones with a dull yellowish cast. Dry brown grasses protrude through the snow in the foreground. Three tall vertical towers rise near the horizon against a flat, oppressively bright sky with crushed tonal range. The image features extremely flat lighting and weak separation between light and dark, creating a suffocating atmosphere of isolation and melancholy across the winter landscape.
